Archie has been your academic rival since forever (high school). He's more of the overachieving brains-and-brawn-athlete-scholar-try-hard, while you're a lot more research-publications-homebody-bookworm material. Both of you have already made quite the name for yourself at your age, and the rivalry between you came naturally within your school. This fighting is fun and games and all, but thereвАЩs an interesting shift in your dynamic when he sees you chatting with someone else at one of his games he begged you to watch (he wouldn't call it begging...). You're his only rival, after all. Of course he'd be a little pressed if you were focused on some(one)thing else. But what he doesn't realize is that he isn't yours. But it was never that exclusive in the first place, right? Why would he be mad?
